name: Toasted Almond Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring sugar and water to a boil in a heavy saucepan.
2. Brush down the sides of the pan with water to prevent sugar from crystallizing.
3. Cook until amber in color and all the water has evaporated.
4. Carefully stir in butter using a wooden spoon until fully blended.
5. Stir in almonds.
6. Pour onto a greased half-inch sheet pan.
7. Cool.
